title: The President (Discharge of Functions) Act, 1969
full_text: The President (Discharge of Functions) Act, 1969 राष्‍ट्रपति (कृत्‍यों का निर्वहन) अधिनियम, 1969 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1969-16 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 1969-05-28 Act Year: 1969 Short Title: The President (Discharge of Functions) Act, 1969 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रपति (कृत्‍यों का निर्वहन) अधिनियम, 1969 Long Title: An Act to provide for the discharge of the functions of the President in certain contingencies.
